    Get up to $800 cash back with an eligible trade-in—more devices now qualify.*** Learn more

    Buy a Windows 11 PC, get up to $800 cash back with eligible trade-in.*** Learn more

    Trade in your Mac, get up to $800 cash back to put toward a new Surface Copilot+ PC. Learn more

    Choose your new Surface Laptop, Copilot+ PC

    $ • • • • • •

    Surface Laptop, 13-inch

    Starting at $ • • • • • •

    Flexible payments available with PayPal at checkout.^

    Highlights

    • Processor - Snapdragon® X Plus (8 Core)
    • Display⁴ - 1920 x 1280 (178 PPI) touchscreen, refresh rate up to 60Hz
    • Memory - 16 GB
    • Storage - Starting at 256 GB available up to 512 GB1
    • Battery life - Up to 23 hours of local video playback2
    • NPU - Qualcomm® Hexagon™ with 45 TOPS
    • Ports - 2 x USB-C®/ USB 3.2 and 1 x USB-A
    • Power supply unit included - Includes 45W power supply and supports USB-C charging
    Customize this device
    $ • • • • • •

    Surface Laptop, 13.8-inch

    Starting at $ • • • • • •

    Flexible payments available with PayPal at checkout.^

    Highlights

    • Processor - Snapdragon® X Plus (10 Core) or Snapdragon® X Elite (12 Core)
    • Display⁴ - 2304 x 1536 (201 PPI) HDR3 touchscreen, dynamic refresh rate up to 120Hz
    • Memory - Starting at 16 GB available up to 64 GB
    • Storage - Starting at 256 GB available up to 1 TB1
    • Battery life - Up to 20 hours of local video playback2
    • NPU - Qualcomm® Hexagon™ with 45 TOPS
    • Ports - 2 x USB-C®/ USB4 and 1 x USB-A
    • Power supply unit included - Includes 39W power supply and supports USB-C charging
    Customize this device
    $ • • • • • •

    Surface Laptop, 15-inch

    Starting at $ • • • • • •

    Flexible payments available with PayPal at checkout.^

    Highlights

    • Processor - Snapdragon® X Elite (12 Core)
    • Display⁴ - 2496 x 1664 (201 PPI) HDR3 touchscreen dynamic refresh rate up to 120Hz
    • Memory - Starting at 16 GB available up to 64 GB
    • Storage - Starting at 256 GB available up to 1 TB1
    • Battery life - Up to 22 hours of local video playback2
    • NPU - Qualcomm® Hexagon™ with 45 TOPS
    • Ports - 2 x USB-C®/ USB4, 1 x USB-A, and MicroSDXC Express card reader
    • Power supply unit included - Includes 65W power supply and supports USB-C charging
    Customize this device

    Need help choosing a Surface Laptop?

    Get quick, personalized guidance powered by AI

  • Ask a question

    • Learn more about design specifications

    Processors

    Processors act like your device's brain, telling other components what to do. The higher the number in the series, the more power you'll have for processing tasks.

    Memory

    The more memory your device has, the more it can do at the same time without slowdowns in performance.

    Storage

    The more storage your device has, the more room for local files, applications, and professional software.

    Display resolution

    Resolution measures how many pixels are on your screen. The more pixels, the sharper your display will be.

    NPU

    The NPU (neural processing unit) enhances AI processing capabilities, like Windows Studio Effects, measured in trillions of operations per second (TOPS).

    Color

    Choose from a variety of fresh or classic colors that come in durable, cool metal finishes that stand up to daily use.

    Frequently asked questions

    |

    • Surface Laptop is a Copilot+ PC designed for work, school, and everyday use, with built-in hardware that enables AI-powered experiences directly on the device. Powered by Windows, it features a sleek design, responsive touchscreen display, comfortable keyboard, long battery life, and strong multitasking performance. Choose from multiple screen sizes and configurations to find the right fit for your needs and budget.

    • The latest Surface Laptop is a Copilot+ PC powered by Snapdragon® X processors, delivering fast performance and on‑device AI experiences. Available in 13-inch, 13.8-inch, and 15-inch models, it combines a sleek design with efficient power and flexibility. Choose from multiple processor, RAM, and storage options to configure a laptop that fits how you work.

    • The right Surface Laptop depends on how you’ll use it – everyday productivity, schoolwork, creative apps, or multitasking. Compare screen size (13-inch, 13.8-inch, or 15-inch), memory (RAM), storage, and processor options to find the configuration that fits your workflow, budget, and performance needs.

    • Yes. Surface Laptop includes a touchscreen display, so you can tap, scroll, and use touch features. Touch can also be helpful for tasks like quick navigation, reviewing documents, and using compatible creative apps. Surface Laptop is optimized for touch interaction and doesn’t support pen input, including Surface Slim Pen.

    • For programming or coding, Surface Laptop 13.8‑inch or 15‑inch models are strong choices, especially with more RAM and SSD storage for multitasking. Models with Snapdragon® X Elite processors are ideal for more intensive workloads, delivering faster performance and AI acceleration. Choose 15-inch for more screen space or 13.8-inch for portability.

    • Surface Laptops don’t include a Microsoft Office license by default. If you want Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, you can add Microsoft 365 during checkout or purchase it separately after you buy your device.

    • Surface Laptop supports a broad range of PC gaming experiences, including many popular PC games through the Xbox app and PC Game Pass. It is well suited for playing a variety of games while also delivering smooth performance for everyday tasks like streaming, browsing, and productivity.  

      Gaming performance and compatibility can vary by game and system requirements. Customers should review a game’s recommended system requirements to understand expected performance.

    • Yes. Surface Laptop is a great choice for students, especially with a built-in NPU that supports AI-powered tasks directly on the device. This helps improve performance and battery efficiency during studying, research, and multitasking. Its lightweight design and responsive performance support schoolwork, research, and everyday use.

    • Yes. Surface Laptop can be a great fit for engineering students working on research, coding, and multitasking. Its built-in NPU helps improve performance and efficiency when handling complex tasks and large files. For CAD or larger projects, choosing more RAM and SSD storage can help support demanding coursework.

    • Surface Laptop ports vary by device size. The 13-inch model includes two USB-C (USB 3.2), one USB-A, and a 3.5 mm headphone jack. The 13.8-inch and 15-inch models have two USB-C (USB4) ports, one USB-A, a 3.5mm headphone jack, and a Surface Connect port for charging and docking, with the 15-inch also offering a MicroSDXC Express card reader.
    [1] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1 GB = 1 billion bytes. 1 TB = 1,000 GB. See Surface Storage for more details.
    • [2] Based on local video playback test. Battery life varies significantly based on usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See Surface Battery Performance for details.

    • [3] HDR requires HDR content and enabling HDR in device settings.

      [4] Optimized for touch interaction only. Pen input and compatibility with Surface Pen, Surface Slim Pen, or similar accessories is not supported.

    • *Eligibility

      • Education discount available to all (i) students and parents of students, including students enrolled in primary and grammar school through higher education, as well as home school programs, and (ii) faculty currently working in education.
      • Military discount available to active, former and retired military members, and their immediate families.
      • Public entities, government entities, nonprofit organizations, educational institutions, enterprise purchasers, and business / commercial purchasers do not qualify.

    • Applicable Products
      Discount valid on select physical consumer products. Discount does not apply to the following products:

      • Xbox consoles, games, and accessories
      • Surface for Business devices
      • Personalized or customized products
      • Digital games, digital apps, in-app content and subscriptions, and associated content
      • Office software & apps
      • Windows 11 and Windows 10
      • Gift cards
      • Services/subscriptions (e.g., Microsoft 365, Game Pass, and Skype)
    • False representations of eligibility voids this offer, and Microsoft reserves the right to collect the full price of product(s) ordered. Bulk orders not valid and may be cancelled. Microsoft reserves the right to determine eligibility in its discretion. Number of products per purchase may be subject to limitations. Commercial purchases not eligible. Personal use only. Available only at Microsoft Store online in the United States. May not be combinable with other offers. Not valid on prior orders or purchases; cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or promo code(s). Refunds will take into account the discount. Price discount does not include taxes, shipping or other fees.

      Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.
    • ***Offer valid with purchase of any new Surface Pro Copilot+ PC or Surface Laptop Copilot+ PC made between February 2nd, 2026 – June 30th, 2026 (the “Promotion Period”) after trade in of qualifying device where the customer submits the online trade-in claim for their used device, plus proof of purchase for new device during the Promotion Period, while supplies last. Available only in Microsoft Store online in the United States. Refurbished device purchases do not qualify for the offer. To be eligible for trade in, (i) you must own the qualifying device, (ii) the device must power on, (iii) the battery must hold a charge (the device must not be required to be plugged in to operate), and (iv) the device must be in fully-functional, working condition and not have broken or missing components, a cracked display or screen, liquid damage, modification(s) or the device warranty seal broken. The device cannot be password protected and must include its original chargers, accessories, and hard drive. Customer must mail in the qualifying trade-in device to be eligible for reimbursement within 15 days of completing the online trade-in process. Devices determined to not meet eligibility criteria may be shipped back to the customer or recycled. Recycled devices are not eligible for cash back. All trade-ins are final. Trade in value depends on device type and condition after inspection by Teladvance. All trade-ins and reimbursements are subject to Teladvance’s sole discretion and approval. See Microsoft Store Trade-in Program for steps and requirements. Not valid on prior orders or purchases; cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or gift cards, or credit towards other devices or products. May not be combined with other offers. Void where prohibited or restricted by law. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time. Limit of 1 trade-in per qualifying Surface device purchase per customer.

    • ^See Flexible payments details.

      >Terms and Conditions

      These Offer Terms and Conditions (“Offer Terms”) constitute the entire agreement between Microsoft and participants with respect to this Offer and supersede all prior or contemporaneous statements, representations or other communications relating to the Offer. In the event of any conflict or inconsistency between these Offer Terms and any other Offer-related materials, including but not limited to FAQs, advertisements or short-form disclosures, these Offer Terms will control.

      Offer Term

      Offer valid from April 15, 2026, to 11:59pm Pacific Time on June 30, 2026, while supplies of eligible PCs last.  

      Eligibility and redemption

      Offer is valid only for verified college students physically located in the United States at time of qualifying PC purchase. Verified college or university students (collectively, “college students”) who are new subscribers are eligible for a free 1-year Microsoft 365 Premium subscription (ARV: $199.99), a free 1-year Xbox Game Pass Ultimate subscription (ARV: $359.88), and a free Xbox Design Lab Wireless Controller (ARV: $79.99), whose colors may be customized (subject to availability). Other customizations available at additional cost. If custom color controllers are no longer available, Microsoft will provide an Xbox Wireless Controller in a preset color ($49.06 with discount; ARV: $64.99) instead.

      Verification requires purchase of an eligible PC, available while supplies last. A list of eligible PCs is available here. Subscriptions and Xbox Wireless Controller available post-purchase after Microsoft has successfully verified student status with a valid .edu email address from an accredited university or college in the U.S.

      Microsoft reserves the right to determine eligibility in its discretion.  

      Subscription eligibility and auto-renewal terms

      Redemption must be completed by 11:59pm Pacific Time on July 31, 2026. A Microsoft account (“MSA”) is required to redeem each subscription. Microsoft 365 Premium is only available to verified college students who are new Microsoft 365 Premium subscribers and to existing Microsoft 365 Personal and Family subscribers who upgrade their existing subscription and all remaining time to Microsoft 365 Premium. See Switch between Microsoft 365 subscriptions. Xbox Game Pass Ultimate is only available to new Xbox Game Pass subscribers. See Xbox Subscriptions Terms & Conditions. If Xbox Game Pass Ultimate subscription is activated prior to college student verification, you must complete verification within 5 days of such activation or the Xbox Game Pass Ultimate subscription will be deactivated.

      A valid payment method is required to redeem the subscriptions. After 1 year, you’ll continue to be charged the applicable monthly subscription fee unless you cancel. See Microsoft Store Terms of Sale. You may cancel by visiting account.microsoft.com/services.

      Controller fulfillment

      Controllers ship to U.S. addresses only. The Xbox Wireless Controller will be shipped to the U.S. address provided during the redemption process. PO Boxes, APO/FPO addresses, and some U.S. territories (Guam and Northern Mariana Islands) are not eligible. Microsoft contracts with ESW for Xbox Design Lab order fulfillment and the applicable terms for such fulfillment are available at checkout and here. 

      PC returns and exchanges

      Returns of eligible PCs are subject to retailers’ terms of sale. Microsoft reserves the right to modify, suspend or discontinue this offer at any time, and to disqualify any redemption of a subscription and/or Xbox Wireless Controller, that Microsoft determines, in its sole discretion, to be fraudulent, incomplete, invalid or in violation of these Offer Terms.  

      Additional terms and restrictions

      Except as otherwise provided in these Offer Terms, offer may not be combined with other offers or promotional subscriptions and cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or promo code(s). Limited to one eligible PC per verified college student and Microsoft account.

      Promotion has no cash value except where required by law. Taxes, if any, are the sole responsibility of the recipient. Offer void where prohibited or restricted by law.
